author: mark
text:
Persistent cross-repo task-master via committed master_url

Adds Config.master_url so a project's hub link travels in committed config (not per-clone .git/config). When set, balls materializes its own clone at .balls/state-repo/ and routes every state-branch op through it via the existing state_worktree_dir() seam; the project's git remote -v stays clean. bl remaster <URL> --commit auto-routes URL-shaped targets to master_url; --detach clears both fields. Legacy state_remote (name) is pinned for 0.5.0 deprecation, kept working byte-identically until then. Covers the fresh-git-clone onboarding case end-to-end: a teammate's git clone + bl prime is now sufficient.

[minor]
